title: Lazy-Sunday Smoky Raisin Greek Crumble
description: A fluffy diabetic-friendly dessert featuring smoky flavors and a crunchy top layer made with just four simple ingredients.

ingredients.name: 1 cup all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: For gluten-free option, use almond or coconut flour

instructions: Mix softened butter and brown sugar until creamy.
Stir in flour and cinnamon, making sure mixture is crumbly.
Press mixture into a greased dish and bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
Let cool slightly before adding raisins on top (optional), then bake an additional 5-7 minutes more if desired.
